[requires]
spdlog/1.17.0

openssl/3.6.2

nlohmann_json/3.12.0

onetbb/2023.0.0

[options]
spdlog/*:shared=True
spdlog/*:use_std_fmt=True

openssl/*:shared=True
openssl/*:no_zlib=True
openssl/*:no_apps=True

onetbb/*:tbbbind=False
onetbb/*:tbbproxy=False
onetbb/*:tbbmalloc=False

[layout]
vs_layout

[generators]
MSBuildDeps
